text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Kan : Hamas has told the Trump administration’s Board of Peace that it will not disarm without a “comprehensive solution” including a full Israeli withdrawal from Gaza and an end to the blockade. An internal Hamas document obtained by Kan states that the group views its weapons as legitimate defence as long as the "occupation continues." Hamas refuses to link reconstruction to disarmament, calling the proposal “unrealistic”. It insists that security mechanisms remain in place to prevent a vacuum. Israel assesses the response will be rejected and is preparing operational plans to resume fighting in Gaza. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：哈马斯已告知特朗普政府的和平委员会，除非达成包括以色列全面撤出加沙并结束封锁在内的“全面解决方案”，否则哈马斯不会解除武装。Kan获得的一份哈马斯内部文件显示，只要“占领持续”，该组织就将自身武器视为合法防御。哈马斯拒绝将重建与解除武装挂钩，称该提议“不切实际”。哈马斯坚持要求保留安全机制以防止出现权力真空。以色列评估认为该回应将被拒绝，并正在制定在加沙恢复战斗的作战计划。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah: We targeted an Israeli enemy gathering in the vicinity of Al-Ishraq School in the city of Bint Jbeil for the third time with rockets.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 真主党：我们第三次用火箭弹袭击了位于宾特朱拜勒市Al-Ishraq学校附近的以色列敌军集结地。

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran views Vice President JD Vance as one of the most anti-war figures in President Trump's inner circle, Reuters reports. A White House official said it was "Trump's decision alone" to send Vance to Pakistan for the talks and that the president will make the final call about what deal ​is acceptable. Another White House official said the Iranians had indicated they wanted Vance to ‌get involved ⁠in the talks. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据路透社报道，伊朗将副总统JD·万斯视为特朗普总统核心圈内最反战的人物之一。一位白宫官员表示，派遣万斯前往巴基斯坦进行会谈是“特朗普的个人决定”，总统将对何种协议可以接受做出最终决定。另一位白宫官员表示，伊朗人已表示希望万斯参与会谈。推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. inflation jumped sharply in just one month, hitting its highest level in two years, driven largely by rising energy costs tied to the Iran war. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042674056177111366/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国通胀在一个月内急剧飙升，达到两年来的最高水平，这在很大程度上是由与伊朗战争相关的能源成本上涨所驱动的。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042674056177111366/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to Reuters, Iranian officials see J.D. Vance as a potential moderating figure, viewing him as the most anti-war voice within Trump’s inner circle. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042672863576986088/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据路透社报道，伊朗官员将JD·万斯视为潜在的温和派人物，认为他是特朗普核心圈内最反战的声音。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042672863576986088/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump privately doubts the Strait of Hormuz will fully reopen soon, despite publicly saying oil would be flowing again quickly, Reuters reports. "Trump appears in recent conversations ​with advisers to have conceded the ⁠Strait of Hormuz, a hub of global commerce that remains effectively shut despite a fragile ceasefire, is unlikely to completely reopen soon," a White House official said. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据路透社报道，尽管特朗普公开表示石油将很快恢复流动，但他私下里怀疑霍尔木兹海峡能否很快完全重新开放。一位白宫官员说：“特朗普在最近与顾问的谈话中似乎承认，尽管达成了脆弱的停火协议，但作为全球商业枢纽的霍尔木兹海峡实际上仍处于关闭状态，不太可能很快完全重新开放。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - OpenAI says a Molotov cocktail was thrown at CEO Sam Altman's house and threats were made at the company's San Francisco headquarters — Reuters https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042672493278687667/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - OpenAI称，有人向首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼的家中投掷了莫洛托夫鸡尾酒，并对公司位于旧金山的总部发出了威胁 — 路透社 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042672493278687667/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Israel is preparing for the possible collapse of US-Iran negotiations and the resumption of war, says Israel Broadcasting Authority. tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 以色列广播管理局称，以色列正在为美伊谈判可能破裂及战争重启做准备。 推文

text: WarTranslated Explosions going off right now near occupied Berdyansk in Zaporizhzhia region. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042671631772881207/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 扎波罗热地区被占领的别尔江斯克附近目前正在发生爆炸。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042671631772881207/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah supporters rallied outside Lebanon's government building, demanding the army arrest President Joseph Aoun and PM Nawaf Salam, calling them "subordinate to the Zionists." The protest followed Salam's announcement to demilitarize Beirut after extensive Israeli strikes on Hezbollah. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党支持者在黎巴嫩政府大楼外集会，要求军队逮捕总统约瑟夫·奥恩和总理纳吉布·米卡提，称他们“从属于犹太复国主义者”。此前，在以色列对真主党进行大规模打击后，米卡提宣布贝鲁特非军事化，随后引发了此次抗议。 推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF intercepted a smuggling drone coming from the Jordanian border. - Israel Hayom https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042669214574518655/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军拦截了一架来自约旦边境的走私无人机。 - 以色列今日报 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042669214574518655/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Pakistan PM Sharif says the leadership of both the U.S. and Iran will start talks tomorrow in Islamabad — Reuters tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫表示，美国和伊朗的领导层将于明天在伊斯兰堡开始会谈 — 路透社 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 There are two possible scenarios: Either no agreement will be reached with Iran and the war will continue — in that case, the United States would have to deploy a ground component and become involved on a much larger scale, which would likely result in increased American casualties. Or an agreement will be reached, but it will be vague in practice and will allow both sides to save face. I rule out the possibility of a deal that fully satisfies only one side, whether Iran or the United States. P.S. In my opinion, they will not reach an agreement and the war will continue, because the reputational, political, and economic damage already inflicted on the United States could outweigh the potential human and technical losses Iran might suffer. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 有两种可能的情况：要么与伊朗达不成协议，战争继续——在这种情况下，美国将不得不部署地面部队并更大规模地介入，这很可能导致美国伤亡增加。要么达成协议，但实际上会很模糊，让双方都能保全面子。我排除了达成一项仅能完全满足一方（无论是伊朗还是美国）的协议的可能性。附言：在我看来，他们不会达成协议，战争将继续，因为美国已经遭受的声誉、政治和经济损失可能超过伊朗可能遭受的潜在人员和技术损失。 推文

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 JD Vance departing for Islamabad: "We are willing to extend the open hand — but don't try to play us." Meanwhile Iran has added a new precondition for Saturday's talks: the release of its frozen assets must happen before negotiations begin, on top of the existing Lebanon ceasefire demand. Trump says the US is "loading up the ships" with weapons should talks collapse. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 JD·万斯启程前往伊斯兰堡：“我们愿意伸出援手——但别想耍我们。”与此同时，伊朗为周六的会谈增加了一个新的先决条件：除了现有的黎巴嫩停火要求外，必须在谈判开始前解冻其资产。特朗普表示，如果谈判破裂，美国正在“装载船只”运送武器。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Tucker Carlson Network responds to Trump: Trump is under a level of pressure that most people cannot fathom, with rabid Israel Firsters viciously harassing him any time he dares to stray even slightly from their favorite country’s agenda. Their shameless pursuit is steadfast enough to make even a man like Donald Trump go mad. They are as persistent as any group in history, no matter how well the White House has treated them in the past. Trump is facing a level of pressure that is dark enough to make him abandon his campaign promises and morph into the precise kind of politician he once vowed to destroy. He would not have let that happen unless his personal stakes were really high.
text_zh: Tucker Carlson Network 回应特朗普：特朗普正承受着大多数人无法想象的压力，每当他敢于稍微偏离那些狂热的“以色列优先主义者”最喜欢的国家议程时，他们就会恶毒地骚扰他。他们无耻的追求是如此坚定，足以让唐纳德·特朗普这样的人也感到疯狂。无论白宫过去对待他们有多好，他们都是历史上最执着的群体。特朗普正面临着一种黑暗的压力，足以让他放弃竞选承诺，变成他曾经发誓要摧毁的那种政客。除非他个人的利害关系非常高，否则他不会让这种情况发生。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Donald Trump is pushing Israel to implement a ceasefire deal between Lebanon and Israel by Tuesday. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12 : U.S. President Trump is pressuring Israel to pursue a truce in Lebanon as a goodwill gesture ahead of peace talks scheduled for Tuesday in Washington. A phone call between the Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors, joined by the US ambassador to Lebanon, is expected this evening to prepare for the talks. The U.S., Israel and Lebanon would prefer that any pause in fighting comes through negotiations with the Lebanese government, not as a result of Iranian pressure. Israel has not yet decided, but some senior officials believe it is the right move, noting that Israel would still be able to act against immediate threats, as was the case after the November 2024 ceasefire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普正在推动以色列在周二前落实黎巴嫩与以色列之间的停火协议。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：美国总统特朗普正在向以色列施压，要求其在周二华盛顿和平会谈前寻求黎巴嫩停火，作为一种善意姿态。预计今晚以色列和黎巴嫩大使将与美国驻黎巴嫩大使进行电话会议，为会谈做准备。美国、以色列和黎巴嫩更希望通过与黎巴嫩政府的谈判来实现战斗暂停，而不是伊朗施压的结果。以色列尚未做出决定，但一些高级官员认为这是正确的举措，并指出以色列仍有能力应对直接威胁，正如2024年11月停火后的情况一样。 @wfwitness

text: Iran ‌sees JD Vance as one of the most anti-war figures in Trump's inner circle. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 伊朗将JD·万斯视为特朗普核心圈内最反战的人物之一。来源：路透社

text: ⚡ 🇫🇷 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 The French Army has released for the first time footage of interceptions of Iranian drones targeting the Gulf states. The video shows several engagements by Rafale fighter jets using MICA missiles. The video also shows shootdowns by Tigre attack helicopters. These were deployed during the war as a cheaper anti-drone alternative to Rafales. As a symbol of French munition stockpiles, the warning "out of amo" shows up several times on the Rafale HUD. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇫🇷 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 法国军队首次发布了拦截针对海湾国家的伊朗无人机的画面。视频显示了阵风战斗机使用MICA导弹进行的多次交战。视频还显示了虎式攻击直升机的击落行动。这些直升机在战争期间被部署，作为阵风战斗机的一种更便宜的反无人机替代方案。作为法国弹药库存的象征，警告“弹药耗尽”在阵风战斗机的平视显示器（HUD）上多次出现。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 "Hundreds of years from now, they will read with mouths wide open in astonishment." Khabar Network analysis: For the first time in history, the United States is giving concessions before negotiations. Iran's Speaker is demanding cash payment up front, stating bluntly "I have no trust in you." The panel notes Iran negotiated from strength, not weakness: "We hit so well that we have expectations much higher than this." An unprecedented reversal of the usual American playbook. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “几百年后，他们会张大嘴巴惊叹地阅读这段历史。” Khabar Network分析：美国历史上第一次在谈判前做出让步。伊朗议长要求预付现金，直言不讳地说：“我不信任你们。”专家组指出，伊朗是从实力而非弱势地位进行谈判：“我们打得太好了，以至于我们的期望远高于此。”这是美国惯用剧本前所未有的逆转。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump privately doubts the Strait of Hormuz will fully reopen soon, despite publicly saying oil will flow again quickly. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 特朗普私下怀疑霍尔木兹海峡能否很快完全重新开放，尽管他公开表示石油将很快恢复流动。来源：路透社

text: Pakistani Defense Minister Khawaja Asif reposts: Israel must be restrained for US-Iran ceasefire to hold.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦国防部长赫瓦贾·阿西夫转发：以色列必须受到克制，美伊停火才能维持。

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 NEW: ‘In recent conversations with advisors, Trump has conceded that the Strait of Hormuz is unlikely to completely reopen anytime soon’ – Reuters @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Pakistani Defense Minister Khawaja Asif reposts: Israel must be restrained for US-Iran ceasefire to hold.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦国防部长赫瓦贾·阿西夫转发：以色列必须受到克制，美伊停火才能维持。

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "The IDF says it took steps to "minimize harm to civilians" in the strikes" Rafik Hariri Hospital in Beirut has begun DNA testing on human remains to identify dozens still missing after Wednesday’s massacre. Israeli strikes were so powerful they mangled bodies beyond recognition, with many victims arriving at hospitals in bags. Identification could take weeks.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“以色列国防军称已采取措施‘最大限度地减少对平民的伤害’” 贝鲁特拉菲克·哈里里医院已开始对人类遗骸进行DNA检测，以识别周三屠杀后仍失踪的数十人。以色列的袭击威力巨大，导致尸体面目全非，许多受害者被装在袋子里送往医院。身份识别可能需要数周时间。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif thanked the U.S. and Iran for accepting his invitation to Islamabad for negotiations which will begin Saturday, in an address to the nation. He described the negotiations as being make or break. "A temporary ceasefire has been announced, but now the more crucial phase is the long-term ceasefire, which is to resolve the entangled issues through negotiations, and this phase is parallel to what is known in English as make-and-break." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫在全国讲话中感谢美国和伊朗接受他的邀请前往伊斯兰堡进行谈判，谈判将于周六开始。他形容这次谈判是成败的关键。“临时停火已经宣布，但现在更关键的阶段是长期停火，即通过谈判解决纠缠不清的问题，这一阶段与英语中所说的‘成败在此一举’（make-and-break）相对应。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Preliminary reports suggest the withdrawal of Israeli forces to the Liberation Triangle (Muthallath al-Tahrir) after suffering significant losses in equipment and personnel on the outskirts of the city of Bint Jbeil following heavy clashes with Hezbollah. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 初步报告显示，在宾特朱拜勒市郊区与真主党发生激烈冲突并遭受重大装备和人员损失后，以色列军队撤退至解放三角区（Muthallath al-Tahrir）。 @wfwitness

text: “Palantir Technologies Inc., the data analysis firm that provides militaries with artificial intelligence models, has agreed to a strategic partnership with the Israeli Defense Ministry to supply technology to help the country’s war effort.” — Bloomberg, January 12, 2024
text_zh: “为军队提供人工智能模型的数据分析公司Palantir Technologies Inc.已同意与以色列国防部建立战略合作伙伴关系，提供技术以帮助该国的战争努力。” — 彭博社，2024年1月12日

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says Wednesday's wide-scale strikes across Lebanon killed at least 180 Hezbollah members. Targets included over 100 sites in southern Lebanon, the Beqaa Valley, and Beirut, including Radwan Force HQs, intelligence division headquarters, and weapons depots. The IDF says strikes were carried out based on "precise, high-quality intelligence," enabling "simultaneous strikes in multiple areas within just one minute." Lebanon's health ministry reported over 350 killed. It did not differentiate between civilians and combatants. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军称，周三在黎巴嫩各地进行的大规模袭击造成至少180名真主党成员死亡。目标包括黎巴嫩南部、贝卡谷地和贝鲁特的100多个地点，包括拉德万部队总部、情报部门总部和武器库。以色列国防军表示，袭击是基于“精确、高质量的情报”进行的，实现了“在一分钟内对多个区域进行同步打击”。黎巴嫩卫生部报告称有超过350人死亡。报告未区分平民和战斗人员。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistani PM Sharif says U.S. and Iranian leaders will begin talks in Islamabad tomorrow, aiming for a permanent ceasefire agreement. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫表示，美国和伊朗领导人将于明天在伊斯兰堡开始会谈，目标是达成永久停火协议。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Shark bite caught on camera in Fernando de Noronha, Brazil. A nurse shark latched onto a snorkeler's leg after she swam too close. She was freed and treated with stitches. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042665198998241719/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴西费尔南多-迪诺罗尼亚群岛拍摄到的鲨鱼咬人事件。一名浮潜者游得太近，被一条护士鲨咬住腿。她随后获救并接受了缝合治疗。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042665198998241719/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian delegation aircraft have reportedly headed toward Pakistan after receiving information that Israel is halting strikes against Hezbollah in Lebanon. ▪️ At the same time, according to Axios, Israel and Lebanon prefer to present the planned ceasefire as a goodwill gesture rather than as a result of Iranian pressure tied to ongoing negotiations with the United States. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 据报道，在收到以色列停止对黎巴嫩真主党袭击的消息后，伊朗代表团的飞机已飞往巴基斯坦。 ▪️ 与此同时，据Axios报道，以色列和黎巴嫩更倾向于将计划中的停火作为一种善意姿态，而不是作为与美国正在进行的谈判相关的伊朗施压的结果。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Tucker Carlson's net favorability among Republicans has dropped by 47 points. Trump's net favorability is now 54 points higher than Carlson's. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042663363805606032/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 塔克·卡尔森在共和党人中的净好感度下降了47个百分点。特朗普的净好感度现在比卡尔森高出54个百分点。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042663363805606032/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 A few minutes ago, the Iranian delegation's planes headed towards Pakistan after they learned that Israel is stopping attacks on Hezbollah in Lebanon. At the same time, according to Axios, Israel and Lebanon prefer that the planned ceasefire be announced as a gesture of goodwill rather than as a fulfillment of Iran's demands and pressure, which Iran raised in exchange for not disrupting negotiations with the US. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 几分钟前，伊朗代表团的飞机在得知以色列停止对黎巴嫩真主党的袭击后飞往巴基斯坦。与此同时，据Axios报道，以色列和黎巴嫩更希望将计划中的停火宣布为一种善意姿态，而不是作为对伊朗要求的满足和压力的结果，这是伊朗为不破坏与美国谈判而提出的条件。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: The Iranians don’t seem to realize they have no cards, other than a short term extortion of the World by using International Waterways. The only reason they are alive today is to negotiate! President DONALD J. TRUMP https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042660939489497576/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：伊朗人似乎没有意识到他们除了利用国际水道对世界进行短期勒索外，没有任何筹码。他们今天还活着的唯一原因就是为了谈判！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042660939489497576/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Cuban President Díaz-Canel on whether he would step down if requested by the U.S.: "In Cuba, the people who are in leadership positions are not elected by the US government, and they don't have a mandate from the US government. We have a free sovereign state. We have self-determination and independence, and we are not subjected to the designs of the United States. On the other hand, Cuban leaders are not here representing an elite of power. You can see my background, where I was born, my family, what I've done throughout my life. We are elected by the people. Although there's a narrative trying to disregard that." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 古巴总统迪亚斯-卡内尔在被问及如果美国要求他下台他是否会辞职时表示：“在古巴，担任领导职务的人不是由美国政府选举产生的，他们也没有美国政府的授权。我们是一个自由的主权国家。我们拥有自决权和独立，我们不受美国设计的摆布。另一方面，古巴领导人不是在这里代表权力精英。你可以看看我的背景，我出生在哪里，我的家庭，我一生中做了什么。我们是由人民选举产生的。尽管有一种叙事试图无视这一点。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT WarTranslated French analyst Clement Molin says Ukraine has carried out over 415 deep strikes with FP-1 and FP-2 drones since January, hitting Russian air defenses, radars, ammo depots, aircraft and more. Actualisation de la carte des frappes ukrainiennes 🇺🇦 en profondeur dans les territoires occupés par la Russie 🇷🇺 Plus de 415 frappes de drones FP-1 ou FP-2 à plus de 20km du front depuis le début d'année dont la majorité depuis février. Cibles visées : systèmes de défense aérienne, radars, lanceurs de missiles, MLRS, trains, dépôts de munitions, bases arrières, entrepôts, avions, hélicoptères et transformateurs électriques. Ces frappes sont régulières, ouvrant la voie à une diminution de la DA russe au sud et à l'est, facilitant les frappes vers la Crimée et le sud de la Russie. Elles permettront ensuite d'étendre l'interdiction de plus en plus large d'accès au front. En parallèle, deux nouvelles technologies de drones FPV kamikazes sont testées, la première visant à ajouter des ailes au drone pour augmenter sa portée et la deuxième en lui donnant un système de guidage révolutionnaire, évitant le recours à la fibre optique et permettant l'utilisation des drones FPV à une plus longue portée sans brouillage. - Clément Molin tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT WarTranslated 法国分析师克莱门特·莫林表示，自1月以来，乌克兰已使用FP-1和FP-2无人机进行了超过415次纵深打击，击中了俄罗斯的防空系统、雷达、弹药库、飞机等。乌克兰在俄罗斯占领领土内的纵深打击地图更新 🇺🇦 自年初以来，在距离前线20公里以上的地方进行了超过415次FP-1或FP-2无人机打击，其中大部分发生在2月。目标包括：防空系统、雷达、导弹发射器、多管火箭炮（MLRS）、火车、弹药库、后方基地、仓库、飞机、直升机和电力变压器。这些打击是定期的，为削弱俄罗斯在南部和东部的防空能力铺平了道路，促进了对克里米亚和俄罗斯南部的打击。它们随后将允许进一步扩大对前线的禁入范围。与此同时，两种新的自杀式FPV无人机技术正在测试中，第一种旨在为无人机增加机翼以增加航程，第二种为其提供革命性的制导系统，避免使用光纤，并允许FPV无人机在更远的距离使用而不受干扰。 - 克莱门特·莫林 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 The Long Road to Slavyansk 📝 On the Slavyansk direction , fighting continues on the approaches to Rai-Aleksandrivka , where Russian units attempt to advance toward the village from two directions. Russian units attack from the Kaleniki side, advancing both toward Rai-Aleksandrivka and moving around it from the north toward the Dolyhy Forest . ➡️ As reported earlier , this settlement holds major tactical importance for the future assault on Slavyansk , so Ukrainian formations will attempt to hold it as long as possible. ➡️ To the south, after repelling enemy attacks on Lipovka , the Russian Armed Forces advanced in the Dibrova area, located near the M-03 highway . Russia's Defense Ministry announced the freeing of this settlement. 📌 Meanwhile, enemy units are mining approaches, establishing fortifications, and reinforcing strongpoints around the cities. Given the emphasis on drone-based defense, AFU command will likely focus on striking Russian supply and movement routes. So far, Russian forces are successfully disrupting enemy logistics . The approaches to Slavyansk and Kramatorsk will be harder to take due to lower settlement density and fewer buildings with basements suitable for accumulating infiltration groups. If you have updates or want us to highlight your unit's successes, you can write to us via the feedback bot @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 High-resolution map 📍 English version 📍 Online maps available by subscription at map.rybar.ru #digest #map #Kramatorsk #Russia #Slavyansk #Ukraine ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版： 📝 通往斯拉维扬斯克的漫长道路 📝 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，战斗在拉伊-亚历山德罗夫卡（Rai-Aleksandrivka）的进路上继续，俄军试图从两个方向向该村推进。俄军从卡列尼基（Kaleniki）一侧进攻，既向拉伊-亚历山德罗夫卡推进，又从北部绕过它向多利希森林（Dolyhy Forest）移动。 ➡️ 如前所述，该定居点对于未来对斯拉维扬斯克的突击具有重大的战术重要性，因此乌克兰部队将试图尽可能长时间地守住它。 ➡️ 在南部，在击退了敌军对利波夫卡（Lipovka）的袭击后，俄罗斯武装部队在靠近M-03公路的迪布罗瓦（Dibrova）地区取得了进展。俄罗斯国防部宣布解放了该定居点。 📌 与此同时，敌军正在埋设地雷、建立防御工事，并加强城市周围的据点。鉴于对无人机防御的重视，乌克兰武装部队指挥部可能会专注于打击俄罗斯的补给和移动路线。到目前为止，俄军已成功破坏了敌军的后勤。由于定居点密度较低且适合积聚渗透小组的地下室建筑较少，斯拉维扬斯克和克拉马托尔斯克的进路将更难攻克。如果您有更新或希望我们突出您部队的成功，可以通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 写信给我们 📍 高分辨率地图 📍 英文版 📍 在线地图可通过 map.rybar.ru 订阅 #摘要 #地图 #克拉马托尔斯克 #俄罗斯 #斯拉维扬斯克 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military has revealed details of its largest strike in Lebanon since the start of Operation Roaring Lion. Within a single minute, the IDF killed 180 alleged Hezbollah members across three areas simultaneously: Beirut, the Bekaa and southern…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF’s Military Intelligence directorate has assessed that at least 180 members were killed in Wednesday’s widespread strikes. Yet, the count is not final. According to Lebanon’s health ministry, ~300 people were killed in the same wave of strikes. This means at least, using the IDF's assessment, 60% of the dead were Hezbollah members – a ratio the IDF considers favourable, but it also means the death of 120 civilians using the IDF's own data. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军方披露了自‘咆哮狮子行动’开始以来其在黎巴嫩最大规模打击的细节。在一分钟内，以色列国防军在贝鲁特、贝卡和南部三个地区同时杀死了180名所谓的真主党成员……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军军事情报局评估称，在周三的大规模打击中，至少有180名成员被杀。然而，这个数字并非最终结果。据黎巴嫩卫生部称，在同一波打击中，约有300人死亡。这意味着，根据以色列国防军的评估，至少60%的死者是真主党成员——以色列国防军认为这是一个有利的比例，但也意味着根据以色列国防军自己的数据，有120名平民死亡。 @wfwitness

text: Acre Today Hezbullah fired dozens up to 100's of rockets towards Israeli settlements and towns in response to the grave Jewish aggression in Lebanon
text_zh: 阿卡今日 真主党向以色列定居点和城镇发射了数十枚至数百枚火箭弹，以回应黎巴嫩境内严重的犹太侵略行为

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "With the announcement of a ceasefire in Lebanon expected tomorrow, and the release of frozen Iranian funds" Nether has been officially confirmed yet. Attacks didn't stop in Lebanon and Qatar didn't announce anything yet about the funds.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“随着预计明天宣布黎巴嫩停火，以及解冻伊朗资金” 尚未有任何官方确认。黎巴嫩的袭击没有停止，卡塔尔也没有宣布任何关于资金的消息。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah said Israel committed a "major massacre" today by targeting the government serail in Nabatieh, killing 13 State Security personnel. The group accused Israel of blatantly violating Lebanese sovereignty and institutions, and criticised the Lebanese government for rushing into direct negotiations under fire while abandoning the resistance’s achievements. Hezbollah called for national unity and warned that concessions only lead to more destruction. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党表示，以色列今天通过袭击纳巴泰的政府大楼犯下了“重大屠杀”，杀死了13名国家安全人员。该组织指责以色列公然侵犯黎巴嫩主权和机构，并批评黎巴嫩政府在炮火下仓促进行直接谈判，同时放弃了抵抗运动的成就。真主党呼吁民族团结，并警告说让步只会导致更多的破坏。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Acre, and the surrounding areas of the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部阿卡及上加利利周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: بيان صادر عن حزب الله حول العدوان الصهيوني على السراي الحكومي في مدينة النبطية: ارتكب العدو الصهيوني اليوم مجزرة كبرى استكمالًا لمجزرته في يوم الأربعاء الأسود، مستهدفًا السراي الحكومي في مدينة النبطية، ما أدى إلى استشهاد ١٣ عنصرًا من جهاز أمن الدولة، في اعتداء سافر وخطير طاول مؤسسة أمنية رسمية سيادية، مما يؤكد أن هذا العدو يمعن في استباحة كل لبنان دولة وشعبًا ومؤسسات، في محاولة لإيقاع أكبر عدد من الخسائر والدمار ليكسر إرادة الشعب الصامد، وليغطي على فشله الكبير في الميدان. إن هذا العدوان الإجرامي يضع الدولة اللبنانية أمام مسؤوليات جسيمة لا يمكن التنصل منها. ففي الوقت التي تهرع فيه إلى استجداء المفاوضات المباشرة مع العدو تحت النار، مفرّطة بأوراق القوة وما سطره المجاهدون من إنجازات في الميدان، وتحت ذرائع السيادة الشكلية، تُترك السيادة الحقيقية نهبًا لصواريخ العدو وطائراته وجرائمه. وإزاء كل التنازلات التي قُدّمت وتُقدم للعدو رغم ما ارتكبه من مجازر وقتل ودمار من دون أي ضمانات مقابلة، والعمل ليل نهار وفي ظل العدوان على محاولة سحب الشرعية من المقاومة الدفاعية التي هي حق يكفلها الدستور والقانون الدولي، يوجّه العدو رسالته بالدم بأن كل شيء مباح أمام عدوانه، وأن كل تنازل يقابله مزيد من الاستباحة والدمار. وإننا إذ ندين هذه المجزرة الوحشية، نتقدم بأحر التعازي من عائلات الشهداء ومن جهاز أمن الدولة قيادة وضباطًا وعناصر، وندعو السلطة إلى أن تعي خطورة مسار التنازلات مع عدو لا يفقه إلا القوة، وأن تعود إلى موقعها الطبيعي إلى جانب شعبها ومقاومته. فبالوحدة الوطنية والصمود والثبات نتغلب على هذا العدوان، ويخرج لبنان كله منتصرًا بإذن الله. #الإعلام_الحربي
text_zh: 真主党关于犹太复国主义者对纳巴泰市政府大楼进行侵略的声明：犹太复国主义敌人今天犯下了一场重大屠杀，这是继“黑色星期三”屠杀之后的延续，目标是纳巴泰市的政府大楼，导致13名国家安全机构人员殉难。这是一次针对官方主权安全机构的公然且危险的袭击，这证实了该敌人正在加紧践踏整个黎巴嫩的国家、人民和机构，试图造成尽可能多的伤亡和破坏，以打破坚韧人民的意志，并掩盖其在战场上的巨大失败。这次犯罪侵略使黎巴嫩国家面临无法推卸的重大责任。在它急于在炮火下乞求与敌人进行直接谈判，放弃力量筹码和圣战者在战场上取得的成就，并以形式上的主权为借口时，真正的主权却被敌人的导弹、飞机和罪行掠夺。面对尽管敌人犯下了屠杀、杀戮和破坏，却在没有任何对等保证的情况下向敌人做出的一切让步，以及在侵略阴影下日夜试图剥夺宪法和国际法保障的防御性抵抗运动的合法性，敌人用鲜血传达了这样一个信息：在其侵略面前一切皆可，每一次让步都会带来更多的掠夺和破坏。我们谴责这场残酷的屠杀，向烈士家属以及国家安全机构的领导、军官和成员表示最深切的哀悼，并呼吁当局意识到与一个只懂力量的敌人进行让步路径的危险性，并回到其人民和抵抗运动身边的正常位置。通过民族团结、坚韧和坚定，我们将克服这场侵略，整个黎巴嫩都将获得胜利，上帝保佑。 #军事媒体

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Israeli media: The Lebanese arena is imposing a continuous cost on us, and the longer the fighting continues, the more we will continue to pay the price, whether in the north or inside Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 以色列媒体：黎巴嫩战场正在给我们造成持续的代价，战斗持续的时间越长，我们将继续付出的代价就越大，无论是在北部还是在黎巴嫩境内。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇯🇴 Kan: The Israeli military intercepted a drone in the Dead Sea area. Initial examination indicates it was a civilian drone, not a UAV, that came from a nearby country – probably from Jordan, not Yemen. The incident occurred during a smuggling attempt from Jordan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇯🇴 Kan：以色列军方在死海地区拦截了一架无人机。初步检查表明，这是一架民用无人机，而不是无人驾驶作战飞机（UAV），它来自邻国——很可能是约旦，而不是也门。该事件发生在从约旦进行走私企图期间。 @wfwitness

text: Middle East Expert Adam Weinstein (Quincy Institute) I don’t think Trump is going to get the deal he wants because he has lost his biggest leverage - the threat of military force. He threw everything at them, but the regime survived. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 中东专家亚当·温斯坦（昆西研究所）：我不认为特朗普会得到他想要的协议，因为他失去了最大的筹码——军事力量的威胁。他向他们投掷了一切，但政权幸存了下来。完整采访
